tests.test_name: Story file upload populates story input
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a story file correctly loads its content into the story field and keeps the Check Coverage button disabled until test cases are also provided.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The story file's content appears in the story input after upload
The name of the uploaded file is displayed to confirm successful upload
The action button cannot be used until both a story and test cases are provided

tests.test_name: Test case file upload populates test input
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a test case file correctly loads its content into the test cases field and keeps the Check Coverage button disabled until a story is also provided.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test case file's content appears in the test input after upload
The name of the uploaded file is displayed to confirm successful upload
The action button cannot be used until both a story and test cases are provided

tests.test_name: Pasting a story that exceeds the character limit shows an error
tests.description: Verifies that pasting text into the story input that exceeds the 50,000-character limit shows a clear error message to the user.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: An error message is shown when pasted content exceeds the allowed character limit

tests.test_name: Pasting a story at exactly the character limit is accepted
tests.description: Verifies that pasting text into the story input at exactly the 50,000-character boundary is accepted without error.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Content at the exact character limit does not trigger an error message
The pasted content is successfully loaded into the story field at the boundary value

tests.test_name: Uploading an unsupported file type to the story input shows an inline error
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a file with an unsupported format to the story input shows an inline error and leaves the story field empty.

test_coverage.verification_step: Story dropzone shows an unsupported file type error
test_coverage.what_it_checks: An inline error is displayed when an unsupported file type is dropped or selected
No content is loaded into the story field when the file type is not supported

tests.test_name: Dropping multiple files onto the test case input shows a dismissible warning
tests.description: Verifies that dropping multiple files onto the test case upload area shows a warning, leaves the test input empty, and allows the user to dismiss the warning.

test_coverage.verification_step: Test case input shows a multi-file drop warning
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A warning is displayed when more than one file is dropped onto the test case upload area
No content is loaded into the test case field when multiple files are dropped
The user can close the warning message after it appears
